TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kalokapuk = Gaga mniq Taytung Cusangsyang ka alang Kalokapuk. 259 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 715 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 41% niqan 296 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 59% niqan 419 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis39%, Bunun1%, Puyuma1%.
S.PHON: = kalokapuk = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦusaŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ kalokapuk. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%, pujuma*%.
S.FORM: = Kalokapuk = Gaga mniq Taytung Cusangsyang ka alang Kalokapuk. 259 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 715 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 41% niqan 296 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 59% niqan 419 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis39%, Bunun1%, Puyuma1%.
S.PHON: = kalokapuk = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦusaŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ kalokapuk. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%, pujuma*%.
